title: Enhance Metrics and add NodeState monitoring for Renode/Zephyr sim
description: Extend Metrics class with Renode-specific counters (bridge messages, protocol errors), add system state snapshot method to Simulation for debugging node states, pending events, active transmissions. Ensure zero overhead when not in debug.
close_reason: Enhanced logging, metrics, state monitoring, fail-fast checks, Renode/Zephyr tool integration and tests implemented. All tests passing.
